top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: A G1-level geomagnetic storm is expected, offering a chance to view auroras at high latitudes.
top_events.action: Check viewing conditions and prepare for aurora photography.

top_events.title: Long March 6A Launch
top_events.description: China's Long March 6A rocket is set to launch with an unknown payload.
top_events.action: Watch the live stream for updates.

top_events.title: Kuaizhou 1A Launch
top_events.description: ExPace's Kuaizhou 1A rocket will launch with an unknown payload.
top_events.action: Follow the launch for potential updates.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
